title.en: The Six Crying Heavenly Venerables roared.

content.en:
"Ye Tian, you're too much!"

The Six Crying Heavenly Venerables roared.

This is the No. 1 treasure house of their Infinite Heavenly Palace, and it is the most important treasure storage place!

Ye Tian, an outsider, actually came to snatch the treasures of their Wuji Heavenly Palace.

More importantly, there is a very high probability that there is an opportunity for him to break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm, Ye Tian snatched these resources, which is to cut off his hope of breaking through.

Immediately, he angrily killed Ye Tian again.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian struck again, and the Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique hit it with a blow, directly hitting a seven-pattern defense Supreme Dao armor on the body of the Six Cry Heavenly Venerables to the point of continuous shattering.

And the Six Cry Tianzun couldn't withstand Ye Tian's attack, and was directly knocked out of the No. 1 treasure house.

As for the other Sevenfold Dao Realm Heavenly Venerables, they fled one after another, and they didn't dare to stop Ye Tian, for fear of being killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

Soon, the items in the No. 1 treasure house were all scraped by Ye Tian, in fact, the number was not too much, but each one was extremely precious.

Swish!

Ye Tian left directly from the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and no one dared to stop him.

Seeing Ye Tian leaving, these sevenfold Dao realms dared to scold.

"Ye Tian of Taisu Palace is so shameless, he actually snatched the treasure house of our Wuji Heavenly Palace!"

"If Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor is still here, how dare he do this!"

"You must let Taisu Palace give an explanation!"

However, they scolded for a while, but they didn't really contact Taisu Palace.

Ye Tian's strength can sweep them away, he is already the strongest person in the Infinite Domain at the moment, and it is impossible for Taisu Palace to question Ye Tian, and he doesn't dare to question it!

Therefore, they are determined to lose this loss.

......

Taisu Palace.

The Taisu Palace Lord also quickly learned about what happened in the Wuji Heavenly Palace, after all, Ye Tian directly started in the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and the Taisu Palace, which had been spying on the Wuji Heavenly Palace, naturally knew about it, and after a little investigation, he knew that Ye Tian swept the Wuji Heavenly Palace and snatched a lot of good things.

"Ye Tian's strength is getting stronger and stronger, and now he has surpassed me!Maybe it won't be too long, he will have a strength comparable to the Eightfold Dao Realm!" the Taisu Palace Lord muttered.

The stronger Ye Tian's strength, the better it would naturally be for Taisu Palace.

After all, he joined the Taisu Palace, and even if he left the Infinite Domain in the future, he would take great care of the Taisu Palace.

The other side.

Ye Tian returned to his residence and began to sort out the harvest this time.

"There are really a lot of resources, and there are even a lot of resources that are of great help to the Sevenfold Dao Realm, which can quickly improve their cultivation. "

"There are thirteen Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, and the Infinite Heavenly Emperor didn't even take them out to cultivate those Supreme Dao Realms. "

"There are also Infinite Dao Fruits, and there are also three. It's a pity that this thing is useless to me now!"

After Ye Tian sorted out these treasures, he suddenly found a box, this box was made of special materials, and there was also a prohibition on it, a rule prohibition arranged with the sixth sequence of supreme dao rules.

"Placing a ban with the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule must be an extremely important thing!"

Ye Tian began to carefully crack this ban.

With the seventh sequence of his ten-percent realm, if he grinds it slowly, it will take a long time to grind it off.

He didn't force it open, otherwise it would be easy to destroy the contents inside.

The years passed, and in the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years of time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally broke the ban and opened the box.

The box contained a piece of heaven and earth, purple stones, and a map inscribed on the skin of an unknown creature.

Ye Tian glanced at the map, and his will merged into it.

Airplanes!!!!!

Each innate primordial domain is presented on it one by one, and a golden dot appears somewhere on the map, and this golden dot represents a certain location in the void domain.

"This map should be a guide to this place!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Then, he looked at the purple stones.

He picked up a stone and began to study it.

"Try refining stones!"

Ye Tian picked up a stone, swallowed it directly, and began to refine.

Suddenly.

A stream of purple energy poured into Ye Tian's origin, and then his origin began to be damaged, but a strange power made his comprehension begin to skyrocket, and there seemed to be a wisp of incomparably powerful rule power in the dark.

"That's ...... Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules!"

Ye Tian finally understood how the Wuji Heavenly Emperor comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and he must have used this purple stone.

It's just that this purple stone will actually erode the origin.

If you only refine one piece, it will not have much impact, but if you refine too much, the origin will be seriously damaged, which is not a good thing for the future, and it will be difficult to improve your cultivation, and you will not be able to progress towards a better realm for the rest of your life.

"Wuji Heavenly Emperor kept these purple stones and didn't go to refine and comprehend the sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules, it's definitely not that it's useless to him, but he doesn't dare to continue refining, and his origin should be damaged to a certain extent!"

Ye Tian guessed.

But he's not afraid!

Even if the origin of his copied body was damaged to an extremely serious extent, he was not worried at all.

Therefore, the value of this purple stone to him is unimaginable!

"Hahaha, I was still worried about how to comprehend the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, but now I don't have to worry!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course, only he dared to frantically refine this purple stone, and if he was the Taibai Sword Master, he didn't dare to refine it.

In the following years, Ye Tian refined one purple stone after another, and the origin of his body was constantly damaged, but through these purple stones, he also continued to comprehend the rules of the sixth sequence of the Dao.

There were quite a few purple stones left behind by the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, which was definitely enough for him to comprehend the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

One era after another has passed.

About three hundred years had passed, and Ye Tian had exhausted a lot of purple stones, and finally comprehended a trace of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao rules on this day.

Rumble!!!!

The sixth sequence of supreme dao rules was comprehended, and a wisp of fluctuation spread, making all the supreme dao realms tremble, even the Taisu Palace Master trembled, as if he had encountered an incomparably terrifying power.

But in an instant, everything was back to normal.

"I've comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Immediately, he took the opportunity to attack the Fivefold Dao Realm.

With the help of the Sixth Sequence Dao Rule Realm, the bottleneck from the peak of the Fourfold Dao Realm to the Fifth Rank Dao Realm was useless and was easily broken.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through, devouring a large amount of surrounding energy, and all kinds of resources were also devoured by him.

After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation was officially stabilized at the early stage of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm.
